name: suncodexclaw
description: Feishu Codex assistant with WebSocket bot runtime, image and voice ingestion, cloud-doc progress logs, and local attachment sending.

scripts.docker:configure: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: npm run go:configure')" && node tools/configure_docker_config.js
scripts.feishu:start: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: ./bin/suncodexclawd start all')" && bash tools/feishu_bot_ctl.sh start all
scripts.feishu:stop: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: ./bin/suncodexclawd stop all')" && bash tools/feishu_bot_ctl.sh stop all
scripts.feishu:restart: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: ./bin/suncodexclawd restart all')" && bash tools/feishu_bot_ctl.sh restart all
scripts.feishu:status: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: ./bin/suncodexclawd status all')" && bash tools/feishu_bot_ctl.sh status all
scripts.feishu:install-launchagents: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: ./bin/suncodexclawd launchagents install all')" && bash tools/install_feishu_launchagents.sh install all
scripts.feishu:launchagents:status: node -e "console.error('note=deprecated; prefer: ./bin/suncodexclawd launchagents status all')" && bash tools/install_feishu_launchagents.sh status all
